repo.description: Drivers for receiving LiDAR data and controlling lidar, support Lidar HAP and Mid-360.

terms.context_snippet: Livox SDK2 is a software development kit designed for all Livox lidars such as HAP and Mid-360. It is developed based on C/C++ following Livox SDK2 Communication Protocol, and provides easy-to-use C style APIs. With the Livox SDK2, users can quickly connect to the Livox Lidars a…
